items.description: Research the planning phase of WiFi penetration testing, including objectives and scope definition.
Investigate the scanning phase of WiFi penetration testing, focusing on tools and techniques for network discovery and vulnerability assessment.
Examine the gaining access phase, detailing methods and tools used for exploiting vulnerabilities in WiFi networks.
Explore the maintaining access phase, including techniques for establishing persistent access to compromised networks.
Analyze the reporting phase, focusing on how findings are documented and communicated to stakeholders.
Compile and synthesize findings from all phases into a comprehensive report.
